data.title: IBM Updates Revenue Reporting Categories for 2025
data.description:
International Business Machines ( (IBM) ) has issued an announcement.

IBM announced changes to its revenue reporting categories within its Software and Consulting segments, effective from the first quarter of 2025. These updates aim to better align with market opportunities and provide more relevant information to investors, without affecting IBM’s consolidated financial statements. The changes involve recasting historical financials for 2023 and 2024 and adjusting revenue categories to reflect the company’s strategic focus on hybrid cloud, automation, data, and transaction processing. This move is intended to enhance transparency and allow investors to update their financial models ahead of the first quarter earnings report in April 2025.

More about International Business Machines

International Business Machines (IBM) operates in the technology industry, focusing on software and consulting services. The company provides hybrid cloud platforms, automation, data management, and transaction processing solutions, as well as consulting services to help clients design and build cloud architectures and optimize business processes.

YTD Price Performance: 14.00%

Average Trading Volume: 4,608,479

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $230.8B

data.title: Air New Zealand Announces Share Buy-Back to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Air New Zealand Limited ( (ANZFF) ) just unveiled an update.

Air New Zealand Limited has announced the acquisition of 2,516,275 ordinary shares as part of its share buy-back program, with shares acquired both on-market and off-market. This move, approved by the board, is aimed at enhancing shareholder value by reducing the number of shares outstanding, which could potentially improve earnings per share and strengthen the company’s market position.

More about Air New Zealand Limited

Air New Zealand Limited is a prominent airline operating in the aviation industry, providing air travel services primarily within New Zealand and internationally. The company is listed on the New Zealand Stock Exchange (NZX) and the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), focusing on passenger and cargo transportation.

Average Trading Volume: 11,499

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.19B

data.title: Pegasus Resources Strengthens Uranium Portfolio with New Funding
data.description:
Pegasus Resources ( (TSE:PEGA) ) just unveiled an update.

Pegasus Resources has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising over $340,000. This funding allows the company to secure a 75% ownership stake in the Utah-based Jupiter uranium project, with plans to achieve full ownership through a maiden drill program. This strategic move is expected to enhance Pegasus’s asset base and position it for further expansion in the uranium sector.

More about Pegasus Resources

Pegasus Resources Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on uranium projects. The company is involved in resource development and aims to create long-term value through its projects, particularly in Utah.

data.title: BW Offshore Sells FPSO BW Pioneer and Secures O&M Contract
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from BW Offshore ( (GB:0RKH) ).

BW Offshore has agreed to sell the FPSO BW Pioneer to a subsidiary of Murphy Oil Corporation for USD 125 million. The sale aligns with BW Offshore’s strategy to leverage its existing FPSO fleet and includes a five-year operations and maintenance contract, enhancing the company’s financial position and supporting its long-term growth strategy in floating production infrastructure and energy transition solutions.

More about BW Offshore

BW Offshore engineers innovative floating production solutions and operates a fleet of three FPSOs, with ambitions for growth. With over four decades of experience in offshore operations and project execution, the company provides tailored offshore energy solutions globally. BW Offshore is publicly listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and employs around 1,100 people.

YTD Price Performance: -2.32%

Average Trading Volume: 2,410

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: NOK4.95B

data.title: Perdoceo Education Approves 2025 Annual Incentive Plan
data.description:
Perdoceo Education ( (PRDO) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 6, 2025, Perdoceo Education Corporation’s Compensation Committee approved the 2025 Annual Incentive Plan, which mirrors the 2024 plan in structure, focusing on adjusted operating income and individual goals for senior executives. Additionally, the committee approved salary and incentive adjustments for key executives, including a 6.25% salary increase for CEO Todd Nelson and a 20% increase in the Long-Term Incentive target for CFO Ashish Ghia.

More about Perdoceo Education

data.title: New American High Income Fund Reorganization Announcement
data.description:
The latest update is out from New American High Income Fund Inc ( (HYB) ).

On March 12, 2025, The New America High Income Fund, Inc. announced that its reorganization into the T. Rowe Price High Yield Fund is expected to close on March 31, 2025, pending customary closing conditions. Upon completion, shareholders will transition to holding Investor Class shares of the T. Rowe Price Fund, marking a significant operational shift for the Fund.

More about New American High Income Fund Inc

The New America High Income Fund, Inc. is a diversified, closed-end management investment company. The Fund’s investment adviser is T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., which manages approximately $1.63 trillion of assets as of February 28, 2025, and has been providing investment advisory services since 1937.

data.title: AlloVir Stockholders Approve Key Amendment and Merger
data.description:
AlloVir ( (ALVR) ) has issued an update.

On March 12, 2025, AlloVir held a special meeting where stockholders approved an amendment to the 2020 Stock Option and Grant Plan, increasing the number of shares available for future issuance and extending the plan’s term. The approval of this amendment and the merger with Kalaris, which involves a change of control and issuance of new shares, is expected to impact AlloVir’s operations by expanding its capital base and potentially enhancing its market position, although there are inherent risks and uncertainties associated with the merger.

More about AlloVir

AlloVir is a company operating in the biotechnology industry, focusing on the development of cell therapies to treat viral infections. The company’s primary products are designed to address viral diseases in patients with weakened immune systems, with a market focus on providing innovative solutions for unmet medical needs in this area.

data.title: Meridian Energy Sets Dividend Reinvestment Plan Price for 2025
data.description:
Meridian Energy Limited ( (MDDNF) ) has shared an update.

Meridian Energy Limited announced the strike price for its 2025 Interim Ordinary Dividend under the Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRP) at NZ$5.3695 per share. This price reflects a 2% discount on the volume weighted average sale price of shares traded on the NZX Main Board over a specified period. Shareholders participating in the DRP will receive shares instead of cash for the dividend, potentially impacting shareholder value and company liquidity.

More about Meridian Energy Limited

Meridian Energy Limited is a New Zealand-based company listed on the NZX and ASX stock exchanges. It operates in the energy sector, focusing on the generation and retailing of electricity, with a strong emphasis on renewable energy sources.

data.title: Sandstorm Gold Royalties Announces Key Developments in Mining Portfolio
data.description:
Sandstorm Gold ( (TSE:SSL) ) has provided an announcement.

Sandstorm Gold Royalties has announced significant developments in its portfolio, highlighting Erdene Resource Development Corp.’s progress in the Bayan Khundii gold project in Mongolia, which is expected to commence gold production by mid-2025. Additionally, Lundin Gold Ltd. reported high-grade gold intercepts and new copper-gold mineralization at the Fruta del Norte mine in Ecuador, indicating potential for expanded resource estimates and increased production capabilities.

More about Sandstorm Gold

Sandstorm Gold Ltd., also known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, operates in the mining industry with a focus on providing financing solutions through stream and royalty agreements. The company is involved in a diversified portfolio of mining projects, primarily dealing with gold and other precious metals, and is listed on both the NYSE and TSX.

data.title: Nokia Executes Strategic Share Buyback to Offset Dilution
data.description:
Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ) just unveiled an update.

Nokia has executed a share buyback as part of a program to offset the dilution effects of shares issued to Infinera Corporation’s shareholders. This buyback, which is part of a broader initiative authorized by Nokia’s board, aims to acquire up to 150 million shares with a total expenditure of up to 900 million euros. The recent acquisition on March 12, 2025, amounted to 16,190,374 euros, increasing Nokia’s treasury shares to 163,883,963. This move is in line with regulatory compliance and reflects Nokia’s strategic efforts to manage its capital structure and shareholder value.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a leader in B2B technology and innovation, pioneering future-ready, intelligent network solutions. With expertise in fixed, mobile, and cloud networks, Nokia has been creating value through intellectual property and research led by Nokia Bell Labs for over a century. Their efficient network solutions, based on open architecture, integrate seamlessly into various ecosystems, enabling new opportunities for network commercialization and scaling. Service providers, enterprises, and partners worldwide rely on Nokia’s network performance, sustainability, and security standards.

YTD Price Performance: 13.55%

Average Trading Volume: 2,637,340

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €25.52B
